objective: Enforce one durable global use of each verified Permit nonce through the existing admission-to-canonical-ledger claim path.
executable_blocker: The exact canonical baseline accepts concurrent and post-reopen claims for different jobs whose otherwise valid Permits share one nonce, despite Permit.max_uses being one.

required: derive a lowercase SHA-256 digest from the verified Permit nonce and never persist the raw nonce
pass the digest through immutable AdmissionGrant and BridgeKernel into the sole canonical JobLedger claim
validate the digest and reject legacy or duplicate claim digests inside the existing BEGIN IMMEDIATE transaction before append
add exactly one partial unique expression index over claim payload permit_nonce_sha256
execution validates exact claim shape and digest binding before runner checkpoint CAS or receipt mutation
all existing authority pause fencing durability and offline reference paths remain green
forbidden: contract table column event type second ledger checkpoint store authority control IPC domain or dependency change
raw nonce persistence logging or receipt
silent legacy backfill null digest acceptance in-memory-only cache or non-atomic check
default allow assertion relaxation skip xfail continue-on-error network or live authority

acceptance_commands: python3 -m unittest tests.test_stage1_admission tests.test_stage1_ledger tests.test_stage1_assurance tests.test_stage1_execution tests.test_stage1_execution_assurance tests.test_stage1_control_assurance tests.test_stage1_pause_epoch_fencing -v
exact write-set raw-nonce dependency private-locator network live-authority skip and weakening scan
rollback: Before runtime use, Agent 0 discards the single worker commit and deletes the isolated branch/worktree. After nonce-bound claim events exist, an in-place downgrade is forbidden; recreate the offline runtime database from trusted references.
